name: Subumbra — Workflow Node (API) via CF Worker

_subumbra_notes.pattern: Workflow-Node (API) — calls CF Worker /proxy directly, not subumbra-proxy
_subumbra_notes.credential: HTTP Header Auth with name=X-Subumbra-Token, value=<SUBUMBRA_TOKEN_PROXY from .env>
_subumbra_notes.url: Replace YOUR-SUBDOMAIN with your CF Worker subdomain from CF_WORKER_URL in .env
_subumbra_notes.provider_switching: Change key_id, provider, target_url, headers, and body.model for a different provider
_subumbra_notes.proof: Requests appear in CF Worker logs and Cloudflare DO dashboard — not in subumbra-proxy logs
